hero.headline: Wear What the Icons Wear.
hero.subheadline: Rolex. Cartier. Audemars Piguet. Patek Philippe. Curated, inspected, and delivered from Montreal to your wrist — with a 30-day guarantee.

why.headline: Montreal's Most Trusted Name in Luxury Watches.
why.subheadline: We don't just sell timepieces. We curate experiences. Every watch that leaves our atelier has been hand-selected, meticulously inspected, and prepared with the same care you'd expect from a Rolex boutique.
why.p1Body: We work exclusively with Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe. No mass inventory. Every timepiece is chosen for its design, condition, and desirability.
why.p2Body: Every watch undergoes a rigorous multi-point inspection before it reaches you. We check movement accuracy, case integrity, crystal clarity, bracelet tension, and cosmetic finish. Nothing leaves our hands unless it's flawless.
why.p3Body: We're not a faceless online store. We're a Montreal-based team of watch enthusiasts who believe luxury should feel personal. You can message us, call us, or visit us.
why.p4Body: If your watch doesn't meet your expectations for any reason, send it back within 30 days for a full refund. No restocking fees. No questions. We stand behind every piece.
why.p5Body: No bots. No automated emails. Message us on WhatsApp and get a response from a real member of our team — usually within minutes.
why.p6Body: Every order comes with a bracelet adjustment tool, premium packaging, tracked shipping, and optional box & papers upgrade. No hidden costs, no surprises.

range.headline: Two Collections. One Standard of Excellence.
range.subheadline: Whether you're starting your collection or upgrading to grail status, Artemis has you covered.
range.essentialBody: The Essential Range is for the man who wants the look, the weight, and the presence of a luxury timepiece — without the five-figure price tag. Carefully selected for design accuracy, wrist feel, and visual impact.
range.premiumTagline: For those who demand the best.
range.premiumBody: The Premium Range is our highest tier. Superior materials, enhanced finishing, more intricate detailing, and a wrist presence that commands attention. Built for collectors, connoisseurs, and those who refuse to compromise.

bestSellers.headline: Best Sellers This Month
bestSellers.subheadline: The pieces our clients can't stop buying. Updated monthly.

testimonials.headline: Trusted by Watch Lovers Across Canada

signup.headline: Get 10% Off Your First Order
signup.subheadline: Create your Artemis account today and unlock an exclusive 10% discount on any timepiece. Plus, get early access to new arrivals and restocks.
signup.microcopy: No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. Your discount code is delivered instantly.

faq.headline: Common Questions
faq.a1: Canadian orders typically 3-7 business days. International 7-14 business days. All orders include tracked shipping.
faq.a2: Yes. Canada and most international destinations. Costs calculated at checkout.
faq.a3: 30-day money-back guarantee. Return in original condition for full refund. No restocking fees.
faq.q4: Can I talk to someone before buying?
faq.a4: Absolutely. WhatsApp us at 514-560-9765. Real team member, usually within minutes.
faq.q5: Is a bracelet adjustment tool included?
faq.a5: Yes. Every order includes a professional bracelet adjustment tool at no extra cost.
faq.a6: Create an account and your unique 10% code is sent instantly. Valid on any timepiece, any range.

footer.tagline: Montreal's premier luxury watch destination. Curated. Inspected. Guaranteed.
